_notes: Source: iit-proj-patient (clinical research, de-identified). Target: hemas-patient (clinical enterprise). Source bans name, address, generalPractitioner for de-identification. Target requires name, address, telecom, and managingOrganization. Completely different extension sets and identifier slicing schemes.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-pat-1 (error: Research patient must have a study identifier), iit-pat-2 (warning: Deceased patients should have a deceased date)]. Not present in target.
New error constraint added in target: hemas-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least one identifier with a system). Not in source.
New warning constraint added in target: hemas-pat-2 (warning: Patient should have an emergency contact). Not in source.
Mandatory extension studyEnrollmentDate[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Mandatory extension consentStatus[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension studyArm[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension dataUseRestriction[0..* mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
New optional extension registrationDate[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension vipStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension insuranceProvider[0..* mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
Identifier slicing scheme changed: source defines slices [studyId[1..1], siteId[0..1]]; target defines slices [hospitalId[1..1], nic[0..1]]. Discriminators and slice names differ entirely.
Source mandatory slice studyId[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in hemas-patient.
Source optional slice siteId[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in hemas-patient.
New mandatory slice hospitalId[1..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source has no hospitalId slice.
New optional slice nic[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source has no nic slice.
name cardinality changed: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Name is required in hemas but prohibited in iit-proj for de-identification. Fundamental incompatibility.
telecom: source inherits R4 base [0..* mustSupport=false] (not constrained in iit-proj) → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. New mandatory requirement in hemas.
deceased[x] MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; target inherits R4 base, not constrained in hemas differential).

address cardinality changed: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Address required in hemas but prohibited in iit-proj for de-identification. Fundamental incompatibility.
MustSupport added on maritalStatus in target (source not constrained; target mustSupport=true extensible:http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status). Optional element; same binding as R4 base.
photo cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..*] (hemas does not constrain photo, inherits R4 base). Ban removed.

contact MustSupport added and sub-elements constrained in target (source not constrained in differential). When contact is present: relationship[1..* ms=true extensible:patient-contactrelationship], name[1..1 ms=true], telecom[1..* ms=true] required in hemas.
generalPractitioner cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..* mustSupport=true] (hemas allows generalPractitioner). Ban removed; also MS added in target.
Reference target added in target: source has no generalPractitioner constraint (banned); target constrains to hemas/Practitioner.
managingOrganization cardinality changed: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Becomes mandatory in hemas.
Reference target changed: source constrains to iit-proj/Organization; target constrains to hemas/Organization.
